description: sandals from lotto with bright coloured straps are perfect for the exuberant in nature. Wear this with casual tees and bermudas or denims. Upper Fabric straps for the midfoot, forefoot and ankle with rubber lining for structure Adjustable ankle straps Stitch detailing on the straps Soft rubber textured footbed for instep comfort Footbed stitched to the outsole for maximum durability Outsole TPU rubber outsole with patterned lugs for grip and traction Branding on the outsole Sandal care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
